/usr/bin/cc -rdynamic -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/threads.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/threads.dir/threads.c.o CMakeFiles/threads.dir/__/deps/tinycthread.c.o CMakeFiles/threads.dir/__/deps/glad.c.o -o threads  ../src/libglfw3.a -Wl,-Bstatic -lrt -Wl,-Bdynamic -lm -ldl -lX11 -lXrandr -lXinerama -lXxf86vm -lXcursor
